creator: knyght@gmail.com
text:
On Mon, 30 Jul 2007 18:10:10 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
>
> Maintainer of emulators/dosbox,
>
> Please note that PR ports/115057 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/115057
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>

I approve.
